allow: Read(//home/alex/DSP-GPU/=== Stale refs to old paths \(should be empty or only spec/audit/**)

PowerShell($env:DSP_ASST_OFFLINE_HF="1"; & "C:\\finetune-env\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "from dsp_assistant.modes.meta_extractor import MetaExtractor, ALL_REPOS, CMAKE_COMMON_BLOCK_ID, compute_cmake_common, extract_build_orchestration; print\('imports OK'\); print\('ALL_REPOS=', ALL_REPOS\); print\('common_id=', CMAKE_COMMON_BLOCK_ID\)")
PowerShell($env:DSP_ASST_PG_PASSWORD = "1"; psql -h localhost -U dsp_asst -d gpu_rag_dsp -c "\\d rag_dsp.doc_blocks" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
Bash(DSP_ASST_OFFLINE_HF=1 python -c "from dsp_assistant.retrieval.rag_hybrid import HybridRetriever, make_hybrid_retriever, EnrichedHit; print\('imports OK'\)")

Bash(DSP_ASST_OFFLINE_HF=1 /c/finetune-env/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from dsp_assistant.retrieval.rag_hybrid import HybridRetriever, make_hybrid_retriever, EnrichedHit; from dsp_assistant.cli.main import cli; print\('imports OK'\)")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command '$c = Get-PSDrive C; Write-Host \('\\''C: free = '\\'' + [math]::Round\($c.Free/1GB,1\) + '\\'' GB'\\''\)')

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path C:\\finetune-env\\qwen2.5-coder-7b\) { \(Get-ChildItem C:\\finetune-env\\qwen2.5-coder-7b -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB } else { 'NOT DOWNLOADED YET' })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:7821/health -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing 2>$null; "dsp-asst HTTP :7821  → $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.StatusDescription\)" } catch { "dsp-asst HTTP :7821  → DOWN  \($\($_.Exception.Message\)\)" })
PowerShell(try { ollama list 2>&1 } catch { "Ollama not running: $_" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path 'C:\\finetune-env\\output\\compare-r4-vs-r8'\) { Get-ChildItem 'C:\\finetune-env\\output\\compare-r4-vs-r8\\' | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { 'compare-r4-vs-r8 dir не создан — compare не запускался' })

Bash(PGPASSWORD=1 psql -U dsp_asst -h localhost -d gpu_rag_dsp -tA -c "SELECT 'use_cases', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.use_cases UNION ALL SELECT 'pipelines', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.pipelines UNION ALL SELECT 'doc_blocks', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.doc_blocks UNION ALL SELECT 'test_params', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.test_params UNION ALL SELECT 'symbols', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.symbols UNION ALL SELECT 'embeddings', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.embeddings UNION ALL SELECT 'pybind_bindings', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.pybind_bindings UNION ALL SELECT 'rag_logs', count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.rag_logs;")

PowerShell(cd C:\\finetune-env; & C:\\finetune-env\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from dsp_assistant.db import get_client; c = get_client\(\); rows = c.fetchall\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='rag_dsp' AND table_name IN \('pipelines','use_cases'\) ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position\\"\); [print\(r\) for r in rows]" 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch "PG connected")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=dsp_assistant psql -U dsp_assistant -h localhost -d dsp_rag -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='rag_dsp' AND table_name='test_params' ORDER BY ordinal_position;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD='dsp_assistant'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin\\psql.exe" -U dsp_assistant -h localhost -d dsp_rag -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='rag_dsp' AND table_name='test_params' ORDER BY ordinal_position;" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
